task.goal: Drive the underpowered car up the right hill to reach the goal position.
task.success_condition: A successful episode reaches the goal before the 200 step time limit.
task.reward_description: The environment gives -1 reward per step until termination. Higher total return is better.
notes: This is a Gymnasium Classic Control telemetry task: the policy receives the official public observation [position, velocity].
The track is fixed. The car usually needs to build momentum by moving back and forth before reaching the right hill.

minimum_score.reason: Policy errors, invalid actions, evaluator failures, and workspace contract violations receive the worst 200-step score.
